# MSDP Test Samples

# Simple variable
MSDPVar "name" MSDPVal "test"
01 6E 61 6D 65 02 74 65 73 74

# Table
MSDPVar "player" MSDPTableOpen MSDPVar "hp" MSDPVal "100" MSDPVar "mp" MSDPVal "50" MSDPTableClose
01 70 6C 61 79 65 72 03 01 68 70 02 31 30 30 01 6D 70 02 35 30 04

# Array
MSDPVar "items" MSDPArrayOpen MSDPVal "sword" MSDPVal "shield" MSDPArrayClose
01 69 74 65 6D 73 05 02 73 77 6F 72 64 02 73 68 69 65 6C 64 06
